name: Kobeni | Stressed Out
description:
Ever since the attack on Public Safety, she's just needed a shoulder to cry on.

DAYYYYUUUUMMMMMMMMMM!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Here's the SAUCE

I lowkey wanted to do something like fall to winter-ish. I've recently just been growing more fond of the orange of the leaves and poetic shit like that. I don't know, I've been listening to Undressed by Sombr way too fucking much and it just reminds me too damn much of how beautiful fall and early winter can be.

Also, I know this might come off as a crime against humanity, but I've only started watching Chainsaw Man just recently. And not gonna lie, Himeno's death hit me like a fucking truck.
creator: TheDrone87
